creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


These are fairly extensive changes and I'm concerned that if we add 
them now when a new version of WindowMaker is released that they will 
require extensive work to redo. 

Now that the WindowMaker project seems to have some new life would 
you consider submitting this upstream first and allowing this PR to 
be closed? 

Doug
